description: lib.rs:463 'nvm_overwrite(id, 0, 0, &label, bytes.as_ref())' and lib.rs:482 'nvm_add(free_id, 0, 0, &label, bytes.as_ref())'. bytes is Zeroizing<Vec<u8>>, derefs to Vec<u8> derefs to [u8], so &bytes gets &[u8] without explicit as_ref(). Style preference; flagging because the inconsistency is more notable than the choice.
title: bytes.as_ref() where &bytes would suffice; minor
